steps.name: User is on the signup page
User fills the registration form with details from signup properties
User accepts the terms and clicks Create Account
User should see a success message or be redirected to the dashboard

name: User Registration
description: This feature validates the signup process for new users on the XATS platform.

elements.name: Successfully request a password reset link

steps.name: User is on the forgot password page
User enters email from "signup" properties and clicks Send Reset Link
User should see a confirmation for the reset link

name: Password Recovery
description: This feature validates the forgot password functionality for registered users.

User enters username and password from config file
